name: AC&T Big Pool (Exxon)
description: Independent AC&T Exxon fuel stop just off I-70 Exit 12 near Clear Spring, with 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, a deli and truck parking.

name: Pilot Travel Center #150
description: Full-service Pilot travel center directly off I-70 Exit 24 (US-63) on the northwest side of Hagerstown, with diesel lanes, showers, a CAT scale, and quick-service restaurants.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #150
description: Certified CAT truck scale at the Pilot Travel Center off I-70 Exit 24 in Hagerstown.

name: Pilot Travel Center #179
description: Pilot travel center on Halfway Blvd at the I-70/I-81 interchange in Hagerstown, offering diesel lanes, showers, a CAT scale and truck parking.

name: South Mountain Welcome Center (I-70 Westbound)
description: State welcome center and rest area on westbound I-70 over South Mountain near Myersville, offering restrooms and truck parking.

name: South Mountain Welcome Center (I-70 Eastbound)
description: State welcome center and rest area on eastbound I-70 over South Mountain near Myersville, with restrooms and truck parking that was recently expanded.

name: New Market Weigh & Inspection Facility
description: Maryland State Police truck weigh and inspection facility on eastbound I-70 east of MD-75 in Frederick County; trucks may park here when the station is closed.

name: I-70 Eastbound Truck Rest Area (Mount Airy area)
description: MDOT SHA truck-only rest area on eastbound I-70 in Frederick County near Bill Moxley Road (Mount Airy area) providing overnight parking for large trucks.

name: Service Tire Truck Center (STTC) - Frederick
description: Commercial truck tire dealer and 24-hour road service center in Frederick serving the I-70 corridor with tire sales, retreads, and emergency roadside repair.

name: Butler Tire Service, Inc.
description: Frederick tire shop offering 24/7 commercial roadside assistance, truck and trailer repair, and towing covering the I-70 Frederick, Middletown, and Mount Airy area.

name: Derek's Towing & Recovery
description: New Market based 24-hour heavy-duty towing and roadside assistance service that covers I-70 plus Routes 40, 144, and 75 in Frederick County.
